mission.title: podman-container-tools: Add hostname to /etc/hosts
mission.description:
This can fix #1745 
Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

resolution.summary:
/etc/resolv.conf and /etc/hosts should not be created and mounted when the
network is disabled.

We should not be calling the network setup and cleanup functions when it is
disabled either.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
